notes: Pass rate calculated over executable cases (19 non-blocked). 6 passed / 13 skipped due to missing product types in post-restore catalog (no variation products, no engraving/upload/bundle products). 12 B2C-VAR cases blocked on catalog data. B2C-CONFIG-016/017 (VCST-4612 regression) PASS — no auto-scroll, selection sticks. B2C-CONFIG-018 (edit configuration from cart) PASS — pre-populated selections confirmed.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Configurable Options
test_cases.notes: PASS: Off-Road Bike at /products-with-options/build-the-bike-of-your-dreams/off-road-bike. Configuration UI visible with Engine and Tyres accordion sections. Radio button selection mechanism. Selecting Engine option (200CC 250CC 4-Stroke Motor, $10) updated total from $289 base to $839/$739 (list/sale). Add to cart button enabled. Cart shows 'Off-Road Bike. Configurable product' with 'Components list' toggle. lineItemId assigned after add: e001911a-9e59-4ead-bcef-77435e591f87.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Required Options
test_cases.notes: PASS (optional sections behavior): Both Engine and Tyres sections labeled 'Personalize your selection further (optional)'. Add to Cart enabled without selecting any option (all optional for Off-Road Bike). No error shown on add without selection — correct behavior when all sections are optional. Optional vs required distinction confirmed visible in section headers.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Optional Add-Ons
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires product with checkbox-style optional add-ons (warranty, gift wrap as separate toggles). Off-Road Bike uses radio-button sections only. No such product in post-restore catalog.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Text Input (Engraving)
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires product with text input/engraving configuration section. Not available in current catalog. (VCST-4987 text section behavior deferred per memory entry.)

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Image Upload
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires product with image upload configuration section. Not available in catalog.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Dependent Options
test_cases.skipped_reason: Off-Road Bike sections (Engine, Tyres) are independent — selecting Engine does not filter Tyres options. No dependent-option configurable product available in catalog.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Bundle/Kit Builder
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires multi-step bundle/kit builder product. Not available in catalog.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Price Calculation Accuracy
test_cases.notes: PASS: Base price $289.00. Selecting Engine option updated to $839.00 (list) / $739.00 (sale). Selecting Tyres option (Avon Viper Stryke, $40) further updated to $1,251.00 (list) / $779.00 (sale). Price aggregates correctly across multiple sections. No rounding errors observed.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Save Configuration for Later
test_cases.skipped_reason: Save Configuration / Load Configuration feature not present in Coffee theme build 2.49.0-pr-2292-f131-f131d346. No Save/Load config buttons found on Off-Road Bike PDP. Feature may not be implemented or is config-gated.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Reset Configuration
test_cases.skipped_reason: No Reset/Clear All button present on configurable product PDP. 'Create new configuration' link appears in edit mode (with lineItemId) as the equivalent reset mechanism.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Mobile Configuration UI
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires mobile viewport (375x667). Not tested in this run — mobile viewport not set on playwright-chrome for this suite.

test_cases.title: Product Configuration - Accessibility
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires keyboard-only and screen reader testing. Deferred to Suite 045 (Accessibility) which covers WCAG 2.1 AA for all pages.

test_cases.title: Configurable Product - Discount Scales Correctly with Quantity
test_cases.notes: PASS (partial): Price sidebar shows list price ($839.00) and sale price ($739.00) at qty=1. The discount is applied via list/sale price differential. Component-level qty spinbuttons are disabled (read-only, preset by product config). Sidebar shows qty=1 with no qty modification UI in edit mode. Discount differentiation confirmed: sale price used (not list price) in price display. Full multi-qty cart verification deferred.

test_cases.title: Configurable Product - Sale Price Displayed as Primary Price
test_cases.notes: PASS: On Off-Road Bike with Engine selection: price block shows $839.00 (list, class='price__list', line-through decoration, smaller font) and $739.00 (actual/sale, class='price__actual', bold, larger). Sale price is primary display. VCST-4586 regression confirmed not present.

test_cases.title: Configurable Product - Mobile Sale Price Display
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires mobile viewport (375x667). Not tested in this run.

test_cases.title: Configurable Product - No Auto-Scroll on First Collapsed Section Click
test_cases.notes: PASS: Fresh page load of Off-Road Bike. Engine section collapsed (shows 'optional' placeholder text). Clicked Engine header — section expanded (radiogroup 'Engine' appeared). Measured scroll position before/after: scrollBefore=0, scrollAfter=0. No auto-scroll occurred. VCST-4612 regression confirmed NOT present.

test_cases.title: Configurable Product - First Click Radio Selection Sticks (No Revert)
test_cases.notes: PASS: After expanding Engine section, clicked first Engine radio (200CC 250CC Motor). Radio checked=true confirmed after 800ms delay (setTimeout). Engine section header updated to show selected product name. Price aggregated to include selected option ($839 total). Selection did not revert. VCST-4612 regression confirmed NOT present.

test_cases.title: Edit Configured Product in Cart - Reopen Configurator with Previous Selections
test_cases.notes: PASS: Cart shows 'Edit configuration' link (href contains lineItemId). Navigating to off-road-bike?lineItemId=e001911a... opens configurator with pre-populated state: Engine section header shows '200CC 250CC 4-Stroke Engine Motor...' (selected option name), Tyres section shows 'optional' placeholder (None selected). 'Update cart' button shown (edit mode). Price shows $839/$739 matching cart line price. Pre-populated selections confirmed.

test_cases.title: Edit Configured Product in Cart - Price Reflects New Configuration
test_cases.notes: PASS: Edit mode opened at cart price $839/$739. Selecting Tyres option (Avon Viper Stryke, $40 x4 = $40 total for this item) updated running total to $1,251/$779 immediately. Price reflects new configuration in real time. 'Update cart' button available to save changes.

test_cases.title: Unavailable Variant Combinations - Incompatible Options Disabled
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: No variation products with size/color combinations in post-restore catalog.

data_setup_failures.description: All 12 B2C-VAR cases (VAR-001 through VAR-012) require products with VcVariantPickerGroup (size/color variation pickers). The catalog was wiped and partially restored on 2026-05-15. Hat/T-shirt products were rebuilt without variation products. No variation-type PDPs available on vcst-qa-storefront.
data_setup_failures.recommendation: Re-seed variation products (at least one product with size+color VcVariantPickerGroup) OR run this suite after next catalog seed cycle. Reference: project_vcstqa_restore_2026_05_15.md

data_setup_failures.description: B2C-CONFIG-003 through CONFIG-007 require specialized product types not present in catalog: text input/engraving products, image upload products, bundle/kit builder products, dependent-option products, checkbox-style optional add-ons. These are specialized configurable product configurations beyond the available Off-Road Bike and Bike with Options.
data_setup_failures.recommendation: Provision dedicated configurable product types for each scenario OR mark as N/A if these product types are not implemented.

cleanup_performed: Off-Road Bike remains in cart (lineItemId e001911a) from CONFIG-001 test. Configuration not reverted.
